damage.value: stinging tail d10+1 (reach), crunching bite d10+1 (hand, grabby, messy, 1 piercing)

instinct.value: to fill its belly and retreat beneath the water

system.concept: A winged, venom-tailed frog-horror that leaps from still water at dusk.
system.tags: solitary, large, construct, corrupted, cautious, stealthy
system.qualities: Clumsy when grounded; hates the sun. Armor 4 (resilience), 0 vs. bronze.
system.description: Everyone knows to shun deep, still water, and the llamudwr — the 'water leapers' — are surely one reason why. Take the body of a frog, six or seven feet long. Add another eight or nine feet of whipping tail, tipped with a venomous barb. Get rid of its legs, but give it bat wings, a span of nearly twenty feet unfurled. Hide it in a lake or fen, away from the sun's cruel light. And finally, make it hungry. Very, very hungry.

items.name: Lurk unseen, pick a target, and wait until sunset
Leap out of the water with shocking speed
Follow prey from the sky, or hanging from trees
Strafe its prey and deliver a painful, debilitating sting
